description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular caseDial style: Blue dial with steel toned and white markings, steel toned hands with glow in the dark feature and branding on the dialFeatures: Screw to reset the time, date display near the 3 hour mark, three face chronograph displayStrap style: Steel toned bracelet style strap with a butterfly closureWater resistance up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from date of purchase, against manufacturing defects
